summary: Iteration 76 - Verified all 4 critical fixes: 1) Dashboard stats API returns 200 (was 500), 2) Supplier module uses aggregation for performance, 3) Supplier Payments page has Add Bill + Pay Credit functionality, 4) Users page branch field is optional. All 15 backend tests passed. All UI elements verified via Playwright.

issues: Console warning about HTML hydration - <tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is a React rendering issue related to dynamic table rows, doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats endpoint (/api/dashboard/stats) correctly uses MongoDB aggregation pipelines for expenses and supplier_payments - no more NameError
online_sales field is correctly calculated from payment_details and sale_type fields
Supplier list endpoint uses aggregation pipeline for total_purchases calculation - efficient for large datasets
SupplierPaymentsPage.jsx completely rewritten with Add Bill (creates expense) and Pay Credit (creates supplier_payment + expense) workflows
UsersPage.jsx allows empty branch_id (All Branches access) for Manager/Operator roles
Branch selector dropdown shows 'All Branches (Full Access)' with helpful tooltip text
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 verified all 4 critical fixes from the problem statement: 1) Dashboard stats no longer returns 500 - uses aggregation pipelines for expenses/supplier_payments instead of loading all records, 2) Supplier list uses aggregation for total_purchases field, 3) Supplier Payments page has both 'Add Bill' (creates expense with supplier_id) and 'Pay Credit' (records payment and expense) forms with branch selectors, 4) Users page allows saving without branch (All Branches access). Performance tests confirm /api/suppliers and /api/dashboard/stats respond under 500ms.

fix_1_dashboard_stats.issue_resolved: NameError for 'expenses' and 'supplier_payments' variables - now uses aggregation pipelines

fix_3_supplier_payments_page.add_bill_button: Present - opens form to create expense with supplier_id
fix_3_supplier_payments_page.pay_credit_button: Present - opens form to pay supplier credit balance
fix_3_supplier_payments_page.expense_recording: Add Bill creates expense, Pay Credit creates expense + supplier_payment

fix_4_users_branch_optional.empty_branch_allowed: Yes - user can be saved without branch assignment
fix_4_users_branch_optional.helpful_text: Tooltip explains branch restriction or full access
